revision.comment: See also [[Category:Colonial architecture]]
1 revision imported
Adding [[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Pages from wikipedia]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Commons category link is defined as the pagename]] to [[Category:Pages from wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[category:dd]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Dd]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Moving from [[Category:Pages from wikipedia]] to [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia40]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia40]] to [[Category:dd]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Moving from [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia40]] to [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia44]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Moving from [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia44]] to [[Category:Categories from wikipedia]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
removing these two bullshit categories
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Bot: tidy & size tag (6 members)
Text replacement - "[[en:Category:" to "[[Category:enwiki linked categories]][[en:Category:"
Bot: tag as Tier 0 category
Bot: confirm enwiki category & retag
Text replacement - "↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "[[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]]" to "[[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[category:confirmed enwiki categories]]"
Bot: remove obsolete category Categories from wikipedia
Bot: remove obsolete category Categories with 6 members
Bot: remove obsolete category Confirmed enwiki categories
Bot: tidy cats/IWs; add JA prose & tracking
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page & cats
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "==Old Content==↵==" to "=="
Text replacement - "==Old Content==↵==" to "=="
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q6939802)
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
Text replacement - "{{draft categories|↵}}" to ""
Text replacement - "{{wikidata link|" to "[[Category:Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata]]{{Wikidata link|"

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "Categories missing wikidata" to "Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata"
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:categories missing wikidata]]" to "[[Category:Categories missing wikidata old]]"
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q6939802)
Text replacement - "Categories missing wikidata" to "qq"
Text replacement - "{{Wikidata link|" to "{{wikidata link|"
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories in Categories in qq but actually having wikidata but actually having wikidata]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Qq old]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Original categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text:
<!--templates-->
{{Portal|Architecture}}
{{Commons category|Architecture by country}}
{{Cat main|Architecture}}
{{Category see also |Colonial architecture}}
{{Container category}}
{{CatAutoTOC}}
{{wikidata link|Q6939802}}
<!--interwikis-->
[[en:Architecture by country]]
[[en:Category:Architecture by country]]
<!--categories-->
[[Category:Architecture| country]]
[[Category:Art by country| Architecture]]
[[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]]
[[Category:Construction by country| Architecture by country]]
[[Category:enwiki linked categories]]

revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] (crud category cleanup) [[git:Emma-Leonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/22556809750|manual triggered pipeline]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Architecture_by_country here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments; consolidate 2 interlanguage link(s) into wikidata link template (has duplicate-language pairs) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/25424774555|time triggered pipeline]]
